name: 𝖠𝗀𝗇𝖾𝗌, 𝖤𝗇𝗂𝖽, 𝖶𝖾𝖽𝗇𝖾𝗌𝖽𝖺𝗒
description:
The iconic girl-trio from the TV series Wednesday. They are students at Nevermore. Visible definition. You are free to create any scenario!

They are aged up past eighteen. Does that put them near-graduation? I'm not sure... :D

Wednesday Friday Addams Enid Sinclair Agnes DeMille Vanisher Wednesday Nevermore Academy

Tip: If you don't want to create a scenario yourself, you can kickstart your roleplay with an OOC note, and let the AI write the story. Your instructions can be as detailed as you want, or they can be as simple as:

((𝙾𝙾𝙲: 𝙿𝚕𝚎𝚊𝚜𝚎 𝚜𝚎𝚝 𝚞𝚙 𝚊 𝚖𝚢𝚜𝚝𝚎𝚛𝚢-𝚝𝚑𝚛𝚒𝚕𝚕𝚎𝚛 / 𝚍𝚛𝚊𝚖𝚊-𝚏𝚘𝚌𝚞𝚜𝚎𝚍 / 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚎𝚍𝚒𝚌 / 𝚎𝚝𝚌. 𝚜𝚌𝚎𝚗𝚊𝚛𝚒𝚘 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝙰𝚐𝚗𝚎𝚜, 𝙴𝚗𝚒𝚍 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚆𝚎𝚍𝚗𝚎𝚜𝚍𝚊𝚢))

👤 ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴘᴇʀꜱᴏɴᴀ: Anyone or anything — any gender, ablity, backstory. You can even be an animal, object, multiple characters, or just the narrator. You can also be a canonical character or an original one.

If you don't want to start as strangers, make sure you specify your relation to the girls individually (eg. friends, enemies, teacher, sibling, etc.) — either in your persona description or chat memory

🏕️ ᴄʀᴇᴀᴛᴇ ʏᴏᴜʀ ꜱᴄᴇɴᴀʀɪᴏ: This is a sandbox bot. You can start wherever, with any setting, tone, or premise. All details are provided by you in your first message and chat memory.
